name: My Volkornbrot
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the molasses and hot water into the dry ingredients until well mixed.
3. Let the mixture stand overnight.
4. Turn the mixture into a small loaf pan, ensuring it is evenly distributed.
5. Cover the pan tightly with aluminum foil.
6. Bake at 275°F for 3 hours.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pan before removing it.
8. Wrap the cooled bread and store it in the refrigerator. It will keep for up to 2 weeks, although freezing is not recommended.
